$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
			SELECT DISTINCT meta_key
			FROM $wpdb->postmeta
			GROUP BY meta_key
			HAVING meta_key NOT LIKE '\_%%'
			ORDER BY meta_key
			LIMIT %d",
				$limit
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
			SELECT *
			FROM $wpdb->posts p
            WHERE p.guid LIKE %s
            AND p.post_type = 'attachment'
			LIMIT %d",
				'%' . $clean_filename . '%',
				$limit
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"
			SELECT p.id, p.post_title
			FROM $wpdb->posts p
            WHERE (
                p.post_name LIKE %s
                OR p.post_title LIKE %s
            )
            AND p.post_status = 'publish'
            AND p.post_type IN (" . implode( ',', $post_types ) . ')
			LIMIT %d',
				'%' . $value . '%',
				'%' . $value . '%',
				$limit
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

			"DELETE FROM {$wpdb->options}
			WHERE option_name LIKE '_transient_seopress_%'

			   OR option_name LIKE '_site_transient_seopress_%'
			   OR option_name LIKE '_site_transient_timeout_seopress_%'"
		)

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'This is your Shop page. Go to SEO > Titles & Metas > Archives > Products to edit your title and meta description.', 'wp-seopress' ), esc_url( admin_url( 'admin.php?page=seopress-titles#tab=tab_seopress_titles_archives' ) ) ) )

wp_kses_post( __( 'A meta description tag should generally inform and interest users with a short, relevant summary of what a particular page is about.
They are like a pitch that convince the user that the page is exactly what they\'re looking for.
There\'s no limit on how long a meta description can be, but the search result snippets are truncated as needed, typically to fit the device width.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
esc_html( '<meta name="description" content="my super meta description" />' )
wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'You cannot uncheck a parameter? This is normal, and it‘s most likely defined in the global settings of the plugin.', 'wp-seopress' ), esc_url( $url ) ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Do not display this page in search engine results / XML - HTML sitemaps (noindex)', 'wp-seopress' ) )

wp_kses_post( __( 'By checking this option, you will add a meta robots tag with the value "noindex".
Search engines will not index this URL in the search results.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Do not follow links for this page (nofollow)', 'wp-seopress' ) )

wp_kses_post( __( 'By checking this option, you will add a meta robots tag with the value "nofollow".
Search engines will not follow links from this URL.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Do not index images for this page (noimageindex)', 'wp-seopress' ) )

wp_kses_post( __( 'By checking this option, you will add a meta robots tag with the value "noimageindex".
Note that your images can always be indexed if they are linked from other pages.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Do not display a description in search results for this page (nosnippet)', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'By checking this option, you will add a meta robots tag with the value "nosnippet".', 'wp-seopress' ) )

wp_kses_post( __( 'A canonical URL is the URL of the page that Google thinks is most representative from a set of duplicate pages on your site.
For example, if you have URLs for the same page (for example: example.com?dress=1234 and example.com/dresses/1234), Google chooses one as canonical.
Note that the pages do not need to be absolutely identical; minor changes in sorting or filtering of list pages do not make the page unique (for example, sorting by price or filtering by item color). The canonical can be in a different domain than a duplicate.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Freeze the last modified date (recommended for minor updates)', 'wp-seopress' ) )

wp_kses_post( __( 'Enable this option to prevent the last modified date from being updated when you save this post.
This is recommended for minor updates like fixing typos, formatting changes, or copyright updates that don\'t constitute significant content changes.
Google recommends only updating the lastmod date for significant content updates.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Minimum size for Facebook is 200x200px. Please choose another image.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Minimum size for X is 144x144px. Please choose another image.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'You have not set a global meta title for this taxonomy.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'You have not set a global meta description for this taxonomy.', 'wp-seopress' ) )

wp_kses_post( __( 'WARNING: Migration will delete / update all %1$s posts and terms metadata, plus global settings (if applicable). Some dynamic variables will not be interpreted. We do NOT delete any %2$s data.', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Do not display this page in search engine results / XML - HTML sitemaps (noindex)', 'wp-seopress' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Do not follow links for this page (nofollow)', 'wp-seopress' ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
								"SELECT post_modified
								FROM (
									SELECT p.post_modified,
										@row_num := @row_num + 1 AS row_num
									FROM $wpdb->posts p
									LEFT JOIN $wpdb->postmeta pm_canonical ON p.ID = pm_canonical.post_id
										AND pm_canonical.meta_key = '_seopress_robots_canonical'
									LEFT JOIN $wpdb->postmeta pm_noindex ON p.ID = pm_noindex.post_id
										AND pm_noindex.meta_key = '_seopress_robots_index'
									CROSS JOIN (SELECT @row_num := 0) AS init
									WHERE p.post_type = %s
									AND p.post_status = 'publish'
									AND (pm_canonical.meta_value IS NULL OR pm_canonical.meta_value = %s)
									AND (pm_noindex.meta_value IS NULL OR pm_noindex.meta_value != 'yes')
									ORDER BY p.post_modified DESC
								) AS numbered_posts
								WHERE (row_num - 1) %% %d = 0",
								$cpt_key,
								esc_url( get_permalink( get_the_ID() ) ),
								$max
							)
esc_attr( stripslashes_deep( wp_filter_nohtml_kses( wp_strip_all_tags( strip_shortcodes( $seopress_excerpt ), true ) ) ) )
esc_attr( stripslashes_deep( wp_filter_nohtml_kses( wp_strip_all_tags( strip_shortcodes( get_post_field( 'post_content', $post->ID ), true ) ) ) ) )
esc_attr( stripslashes_deep( wp_filter_nohtml_kses( wp_strip_all_tags( strip_shortcodes( get_post_field( 'post_content', $post->ID ), true ) ) ) ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'Set thee category that gets used in the %s permalink and in our breadcrumbs if you have multiple categories.', 'wp-seopress' ), '%category%' ) )

wp_kses_post( __( 'Should be improved: red or orange dots
Good: yellow or green dots', 'wp-seopress' ) )

				"
			SELECT *
			FROM $wpdb->posts p
            WHERE p.guid LIKE %s

			LIMIT %d",

$wpdb->prepare(
				"
